_doc:
Vampire clan registry. Each entry is the lore + display data for a clan; the matching mechanical effects (skill caps, frenzy modifiers, etc.) live as `clan_*` entries in traits.json. The two files are intentionally separate so clan flavor can be edited without touching the mechanic encoding.

At embrace time, the embrace flow grants the matching `clan_*` trait and surfaces the `display_name` / `description` in the creation flow.

brujah.description: The Rabble. Passion runs in their blood — orators, idealists, brawlers. Easy to anger, easy to love, hard to ignore.
brujah.bane: Frenzy threshold is lower — anger sparks faster than for most kindred.

toreador.description: The Artisans. Beauty captivates them — paintings, music, mortals. Sirens of the high society and stalkers of inspiration.
toreador.bane: Distracted in art-rich rooms; perception suffers when surrounded by beauty.

ventrue.description: The Lords. Born to rule, accustomed to obedience. The blue-bloods of kindred society.
ventrue.bane: Refined palate — only feeds well from a chosen mortal type, set at the embrace.

nosferatu.description: The Hidden. Twisted beyond recognition by the embrace — sewers and shadows are home, secrets are coin.
nosferatu.bane: Hideous on sight. Mortal NPCs who see them unobfuscated risk breaking the masquerade.

gangrel.description: The Outlanders. Wild, animal, untamed. They walk where wolves walk, and bear the marks of every frenzy.
gangrel.bane: Each frenzy leaves a permanent animal mark — fangs, fur, slitted eyes — accumulating over centuries.
